name: Damson Cheese (Zwetschgenmus)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit the damsons and mince them or puree in a blender or food processor, retaining as much juice as possible.
2. Add water to the minced damsons until smooth.
3. Slowly bring the mixture to a boil on low heat for several hours without stirring, as the pulp is prone to scorching.
4. Stir continuously during thickening until it reaches a consistency where a spoon stands upright; expect sputtering and bubbling.
5. Transfer the cheese to stoneware crocks and bake in an oven until a crust forms on top.
6. Place a piece of parchment soaked in rum (or linen/parchment) over the crust before sealing with plastic wrap for better storage.
This recipe remains true to the original instructions, maintaining clarity and consistency while adhering to the specified rules.
